name: Deterministic Elden Ring Seamless Co-op selected-slot autoload on Linux Proton

description: Baseline: seed autoresearch session and measure current deterministic autoload/static-RE state

asi.hypothesis: Establish a committed autoresearch baseline around the existing no-nudge autoload implementation, static Continue/load hook evidence, and latest structured runtime telemetry without launching ER.
asi.caveat: The first scorer credited native_request_consumed from stale structured evidence plus title bootstrap even though game_save_state stayed 0. This is not a runtime-success claim; next iteration should tighten scoring to require an actual save/load state transition for 800.
asi.next_action_hint: Fix measure.sh so 800 requires native request consumption plus nonzero save/load-state transition evidence; then reinitialize the experiment baseline because the benchmark scoring semantics were corrected.

name: Deterministic Elden Ring Seamless Co-op selected-slot autoload on Linux Proton (strict no-false-positive scorer)

description: Tighten scorer so native_request_consumed requires queued request plus load-hook state transition

asi.hypothesis: Eliminate a false-positive 800 by only counting native_request_consumed when a queued direct continue request is followed by a native load hook with nonzero save/load-state transition evidence.
asi.observed_trace: continue-trace shows queued slot=9 request_save/save_request_profile, then menu_new_or_load_wrapper -> current_slot_load_67b570 ret=1 with GameMan state 0->1 and b73 cleared. Final telemetry still player_available=false/game_save_state=0, so this remains 800 not 1000.
asi.next_action_hint: Static-RE the downstream reset to slot=-1/state=0 after current_slot_load_67b570; likely need identify which menu/scheduler state or GameMan field selects the actual requested slot and keeps load progression alive.

description: Try b72-only direct continue queue via set_save_slot + save_request_profile without request_save

asi.hypothesis: Because static disassembly shows request_save(1) sets both GameMan b73 and b72, try a b72-only native queue by calling save_request_profile(1) after set_save_slot(slot), hoping the scheduler chooses continue_load_67b750 instead of current_slot_load_67b570.
asi.runtime_command: ./.auto/measure.sh with .auto/run-runtime-once=150, which delegated to .auto/runtime_probe.sh and scripts/er-smoke-driver.sh drive --launch-mode direct-protected --max-seconds 150 --max-nudges 0 --screenshot-ext jpg
asi.observed: Trace shows set_save_slot(9) then save_request_profile(1) leaves b72=1,b73=0, but no menu_continue_wrapper/continue_load/native consumption occurs within 150s. Later game code sets slot=-1 while b72 remains set. Final telemetry remains player_available=false, game_save_state=0, game_save_requested=true.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 800 to 400: b72-only queue did not produce the previously observed native load-hook state transition.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not retry b72-only alone. Static RE should identify the menu-task condition that invokes menu_continue_wrapper/continue_load_67b750, or test a targeted queued call that sets b72 while preserving the title/menu task object state that Continue uses. Runtime wrapper teardown and no-pointer path worked and can be reused.

description: Gate direct autoload queue to CSTask scheduler ticks instead of background/no-overlay polling thread

asi.hypothesis: Queueing from the background autoload polling thread may race the game scheduler; require DirectMenuLoad to wait for a FrameBegin CSTask scheduler tick before writing native save-load flags.
asi.runtime_command: ./.auto/measure.sh with .auto/run-runtime-once=150, delegating to .auto/runtime_probe.sh and scripts/er-smoke-driver.sh drive --launch-mode direct-protected --max-seconds 150 --max-nudges 0 --screenshot-ext jpg
asi.observed: Telemetry stayed at autoload_last_status='waiting for game scheduler tick before direct continue queue for slot 9' for 150 attempts. Trace saw title map_load_67bc10 ret=1 and game native request_save/save_request_profile with slot=-1, but no autoload set_save_slot(9) or load-hook consumption occurred.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 800 to 600; scheduler_tick gating prevented the no-overlay autoload path from queuing at all in this runtime path.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not simply gate the background poller off. If scheduler alignment is needed, add a positive handoff from the poller to the game task and prove the game task observes GameMan before blocking background writes.

description: Runtime test existing requested_index method via GameMan +0xb78 only

asi.hypothesis: The MoveMapList scheduler branch at 0x140afba31 checks requested_save_slot_load_index (+0xb78) when b72/b73 are clear, so maybe the existing requested_index method is enough to queue selected slot 9 without host input.
asi.observed: Telemetry shows requested_index repeatedly wrote +0xb78=9 for 563 attempts, but game_save_slot stayed -1, save_requested=false, player_available=false. Continue trace installed hooks but saw no load/menu task consumption in this run.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 800 to 400; +0xb78 alone did not advance native save/load state in bounded runtime.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not retry +0xb78 alone. Static disassembly shows +0xb78 branch at 0x140afba31 still needs surrounding menu/scheduler state and successful 0x14067b200 validation before it calls downstream slot-select routines.

description: Invoke native combined_load_67b940 after traced direct continue flags

asi.hypothesis: Static refs show MoveMapList calls combined_load_67b940 when b72 and b73 are both set; directly invoking the native combined path after set_save_slot/request_save/save_request_profile might complete the selected slot load without host input.
asi.runtime_command: ./.auto/measure.sh with .auto/run-runtime-once=150 and default direct_menu_load env, delegating to .auto/runtime_probe.sh
asi.observed: combined_load_67b940(-1,0,0) returned 1 and moved GameMan state 0->1, cleared b72/b73, set bb8=1, and advanced bbc 1->2. After 150s telemetry still player_available=false and game_save_state=1, so this is not better than the 800 baseline and is more invasive/direct.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric was unchanged at 800 and complexity/invasiveness increased; no player availability or selected-slot completion.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not keep direct combined_load as production path. The missing transition is after state=1/bb8=1/bbc=2; static-RE the post-load-state pump/reset path (0x1406794b0/0x140679510 and b80/bb8/bbc/bc0/bc4) before trying another runtime probe.

description: Add temporary MoveMapList save-load dispatcher trace hook at 0x140afb880

asi.hypothesis: Hook the static dispatcher at 0x140afb880 to prove whether the MoveMapList scheduler observes b72/b73/+0xb78 flags after autoload queues them.
asi.runtime_command: ./.auto/measure.sh with .auto/run-runtime-once=120, delegating to .auto/runtime_probe.sh and default direct_menu_load
asi.observed: Hook installed successfully (count=12) but move_map_save_load_dispatch_afb880 never entered during this no-overlay direct-protected run. Autoload still queued set_save_slot/request_save/save_request_profile from the polling path; telemetry ended save_slot=9, save_requested=true, save_state=0, player_available=false.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 800 to 400 and the temporary trace increased invasiveness without producing scheduler-consumption evidence.
asi.next_action_hint: The no-overlay direct-protected runtime may not be reaching the MoveMapList dispatcher/title menu reliably. Static path remains: 0x140afb880 dispatches b72+b73 to combined_load, b72-only to continue_load, b73-only to current_slot_load, +0xb78 to requested-slot validation.

description: Invoke native title bootstrap map_load_67bc10 before direct continue queue after grace timeout

asi.hypothesis: If no title-bootstrap/menu task appears without host input, directly invoke the same native map_load_67bc10 path used by menu_other_load_wrapper, wait for save_state to settle, then queue direct continue flags.
asi.runtime_command: ./.auto/measure.sh with .auto/run-runtime-once=220 and default direct_menu_load, delegating to .auto/runtime_probe.sh
asi.observed: At attempt 206 the code invoked native map_load_67bc10; trace shows ret=1 and GameMan save_state 0->1, title_bootstrap_seen=1. save_state never returned to 0 during the remaining bounded run, so the direct continue flags were never queued. Final telemetry game_save_slot=-1, player_available=false.
asi.rollback_reason: Primary metric dropped from 800 to 600; direct title bootstrap alone strands GameMan in save_state=1 without the surrounding menu task pump.
asi.next_action_hint: Do not call map_load_67bc10 standalone. The missing component is the wrapper/task pump around 0x14082bb00/0x14082a0f0 that advances save_state back to 0 or to player load; static-RE those task objects before more runtime.
